entries.name: norm_sq_sgd_step
entries.signature: theorem norm_sq_sgd_step (w g wStar : E) (η : ℝ) : ‖(w - η • g) - wStar‖ ^ 2 = ‖w - wStar‖ ^ 2 - 2 * η * ⟪w - wStar, g⟫_ℝ + η ^ 2 * ‖g‖ ^ 2 := by

entries.name: IsUnbiased'
entries.signature: def IsUnbiased' (gradL : E → S → E) (gradF : E → E) (ν : Measure S) : Prop := ∀ w : E, ∫ s, gradL w s ∂ν = gradF w /-- Bounded second moment: `E_ν[‖gradL(w, ·)‖²] ≤ σ²` for all `w`, with explicit integrability (see docs/CONVENTIONS.md §1). -/
entries.snippet:
def IsUnbiased' (gradL : E → S → E) (gradF : E → E) (ν : Measure S) : Prop :=
  ∀ w : E, ∫ s, gradL w s ∂ν = gradF w

entries.name: HasBoundedVariance'
entries.signature: def HasBoundedVariance' (gradL : E → S → E) (ν : Measure S) (σ : ℝ) : Prop := ∀ w : E, Integrable (fun s => ‖gradL w s‖ ^ 2) ν ∧ ∫ s, ‖gradL w s‖ ^ 2 ∂ν ≤ σ ^ 2 /-- L-smoothness: the true gradient `gradF` is `L`-Lipschitz. -/ def IsLSmooth' (gradF : E → E) (L : NNReal) : Prop :=
entries.snippet:
def HasBoundedVariance' (gradL : E → S → E) (ν : Measure S) (σ : ℝ) : Prop :=
  ∀ w : E, Integrable (fun s => ‖gradL w s‖ ^ 2) ν ∧ ∫ s, ‖gradL w s‖ ^ 2 ∂ν ≤ σ ^ 2

entries.name: IsLSmooth'
entries.signature: def IsLSmooth' (gradF : E → E) (L : NNReal) : Prop := LipschitzWith L gradF /-- `gradF` is the gradient of `f` at every point. -/ def IsGradientOf' (f : E → ℝ) (gradF : E → E) : Prop :=
entries.snippet:
def IsLSmooth' (gradF : E → E) (L : NNReal) : Prop :=
  LipschitzWith L gradF

entries.name: IsGradientOf'
entries.signature: def IsGradientOf' (f : E → ℝ) (gradF : E → E) : Prop := ∀ w : E, HasGradientAt f (gradF w) w /-- `wStar` is a global minimizer of `f`. -/ def IsMinimizer' (f : E → ℝ) (wStar : E) : Prop :=
entries.snippet:
def IsGradientOf' (f : E → ℝ) (gradF : E → E) : Prop :=
  ∀ w : E, HasGradientAt f (gradF w) w

entries.name: IsMinimizer'
entries.signature: def IsMinimizer' (f : E → ℝ) (wStar : E) : Prop := ∀ w : E, f wStar ≤ f w -- ============================================================================ -- StochasticDescentHyps structure
entries.snippet:
def IsMinimizer' (f : E → ℝ) (wStar : E) : Prop :=
  ∀ w : E, f wStar ≤ f w

entries.name: StochasticDescentHyps
entries.signature: structure StochasticDescentHyps (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E] [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E] (S : Type*) [MeasurableSpace S] (Ω : Type*) [MeasurableSpace Ω] where
entries.snippet:
structure StochasticDescentHyps
    (E : Type*) [NormedAddCommGroup E] [InnerProductSpace ℝ E] [CompleteSpace E]
      [MeasurableSpace E] [BorelSpace E] [SecondCountableTopology E]

entries.name: descent_lemma'
entries.signature: lemma descent_lemma' {f : E → ℝ} {gradF : E → E} {L : NNReal} (hgrad : IsGradientOf' f gradF) (hsmooth : IsLSmooth' gradF L) (w g : E) (η : ℝ) : f (w - η • g) ≤ f w - η * ⟪gradF w, g⟫_ℝ + (L : ℝ) / 2 * η ^ 2 * ‖g‖ ^ 2 := by

entries.signature: theorem stochastic_descent_nonconvex' (hyps : StochasticDescentHyps E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {L : NNReal} {σ : ℝ} (hgrad : IsGradientOf' f hyps.gradF) (hsmooth : IsLSmooth' hyps.gradF L) (hvar : HasBoundedVariance' hyps.gradL hyps.ν σ)

entries.name: stochastic_descent_convex'
entries.signature: theorem stochastic_descent_convex' (hyps : StochasticDescentHyps E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {σ : ℝ} (wStar : E) (hgrad : IsGradientOf' f hyps.gradF) (hconvex : ConvexOn ℝ Set.univ f) (hvar : HasBoundedVariance' hyps.gradL hyps.ν σ)

theorem stochastic_descent_convex'
    (hyps : StochasticDescentHyps E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {σ : ℝ} (wStar : E)

entries.name: stochastic_descent_strongly_convex'
entries.signature: theorem stochastic_descent_strongly_convex' (hyps : StochasticDescentHyps E S Ω) (f : E → ℝ) {μ σ : ℝ} (wStar : E) (hgrad : IsGradientOf' f hyps.gradF) (hsc : StrongConvexOn Set.univ μ f) (hvar : HasBoundedVariance' hyps.gradL hyps.ν σ)
